use_cases: Displaying status indicators and category labels in product cards
Showing notification counts and tags in UI elements
Highlighting feature badges in pricing or feature comparison sections
Marking new, beta, or featured items in content lists
Indicating user roles or permissions in interface elements
ai_summary: A lightweight Badge component from the shadcn/ui design system featuring four variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) with consistent styling using CVA for variant management. The badge renders as an inline-flex element with rounded corners and proper focus states for accessibility, commonly used for labels, tags, and status indicators across various UI contexts.
